mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO query_step_log ( query_log_id, step_id, step_index, sql_template, filled_sql, datasource_id, execution_success, result_count, execution_time, error_message ) VALUES
(#{log.queryLogId}, #{log.stepId}, #{log.stepIndex}, #{log.sqlTemplate}, #{log.filledSql}, #{log.datasourceId}, #{log.executionSuccess}, #{log.resultCount}, #{log.executionTime}, #{log.errorMessage})
